title: agrostis tenuis var. humilis
intro: Agrostis tenuis var. humilis is a type of perennial grass known as Red Fescue, characterized by its slender leaves and ability to thrive in a wide range of environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Red Fescue include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
